# Check current bar position
seg = current_frame.segmentation['nodes']
for n in seg:
    if n['color'] == 'O':
        print(f"Orange: boundary={n['boundary']}")
    if n['color'] == 'b' and n['pixels'] == 15:
        print(f"Blue bar: boundary={n['boundary']}")

# The bar needs to go through the corridor at cols 34-38, rows 17-24
# Let me check the current state of the corridor
ascii_lines = current_frame.ascii.split('\n')
print("\n=== Corridor and top area (rows 16-26, cols 32-42) ===")
for i in range(16, 27):
    print(f"  Row {i}: '{ascii_lines[i][32:42]}'")
</parameter>
</function>
</tool_call>
